description: Ghana-Cote d'Ivoire expansion proposed 2017, no confirmed progress since 2021, effectively stalled
No landlocked West African countries currently served, despite regional demand
WAGPA (2025) publicly signaled intent to extend pipeline to landlocked countries and new coastal markets
Nigeria-Morocco Gas Pipeline, in early planning, could position WAGP as the template/entry point for a much larger regional network
Record 2025 delivery performance and 99% asset availability support the case for expansion investment
